enquiry.transfer.picked.up
Hi Jannik, I just wwent through your request.
please wait for a moment, let me check your service
Hello
I need to verify my Hong Kong Company via SMS to connect my facebook business account. I am currently located in Thailand. Can you help me with that?

You can purchase a Hong Kong virtual number with us. However, to be honest with you, it's unlike a number with SIM card. We are not guarantee to receive the OTP from 3rd party platform such as Facebook
Except for the SMS, do you have the need to obtain a number with call capability?
I just need SMS for now

our HK number has the capability to recieve SMS from mobile phone. As for social channel, some can be recieved, some cannot depending on the platform..

The monthly fee of the number itself is $25. and you need to prepay to activate it.
you can cancel the subscription any time and you won't be charged again for the next bill cycle.
You can apply for the number via https://servicehub.cinnox.com/buy-virtual-number
which type of card should I purchase to receive SMS. Local Number DID or Toll Number?
we don't have number with 'card'. It's all virtual number which should be provisioned to our platform CINNOX
to recieve SMS, you need a DID
okay i just asked because on your website i get these two options
choose DID, it can be used to make and recieve calls too
toll-free can only recieve calls
alright
thanks
no problem. Once you submit the company documents, we will review it. If it's approved, you will recieve a payment link. After you settle the payment, you will see the number in your CINNOX service.
Just to clarify for the first month how much is it in total? Is it $25 dollors + an activation fee?
there's no activaiton fee.  Just the number and you have to top up at least$5 for the traffic
thanks
no problem. Let us know should you have any questions :)
before I book this. Do you think I will be able to recieve the OTP SMS from facebook? Honestly thats the only usecase for that.
are you still there?
yes, I am checking with my colleague as she tested OTP before. However, if my memory serves, it works for WhatsApp. Facebook business manager..we cannot guarantee
the think is I only need it for this one verification code from facebook to verify my company haha
can't you use number from other country? with number that you can get with SIM card
unfortunately not. Facebook only allowes the companys country. Thats why I have to verify it with a hong kong number here from thailand
if you don't mind, please have this room open. It's the lunch time for my colleague. Let me confirm wether she ever tested the number to receive OTP from Facebook
i will try :)
i get this error when trying to check out
i think its because I´ve tried before and tried for a second time now. Do oyu know how to fix that?
have you ever provide your info via our website?
i need to seek for enginner's support for this..
did you use this email contact@rsnstudios.com?
yes
do you have another email? changing an email will be the most efficient way
This is the only business email i have
I see
it will take some time to clear it in the database.
Will it be resolved if I verify the email?
Let me try that
My college will take care of that
I will request to clear the cache at the same time
To confirm, you haven't got a CINNOX service, right?
My colleague didn't test FB OTP. the reason why there's a concern is because sender ID, the ID facebook uses to send OTP, has somehting to do with the delivery/receipt..
HEy Jannik
my colleague quickly checked Facebook...it failed.
it doesn't allow a virtual number
Facebook's security mechnism doesn't allow a virtual number
okay thanks
Sorry that we cannot fulfill your need
